title: Implement Radio abstraction trait
description: Create Radio trait with: configure(), transmit(), receive(), cad(), rssi(), snr(). Implement for sx126x, sx127x, and simulated backends. Per spec section 3.
close_reason: Done for the Python-prototype scope: radio/base.py defines Radio(Protocol); SimRadio implements it with full tests. Hardware backends (sx126x/sx127x) belong to the embedded phases. (Re-applied on main after a branch-switch reverted the reconciliation close.)
